---
title: "The Department of Psychology becomes a financially supporting institutional member of the OSC"
date: 2022-10-08
subtitle: "The OSC is grateful for the Department of Psychology’s support!"
categories: ["New Members"]

template: templates/news-template.html
filters:
  - templates/process-news-yaml.lua
---

<p>The Department of Psychology, represented by Prof. Dr. Felix Schönbrodt, OSC managing director, has been an institutional member from the foundation of the OSC, and is now supporting the OSC financially.</p>
<div class="g-clear"></div>
